name: Chalupas with Chipotle Chiles
recipeIngredient: 1 16 oz package dried pinto beans, soaked several hours
2 to 3 chipotle peppers, en adobo, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the pork roast with salt and pepper.
2. Cut small slits in the roast and insert garlic slices.
3. Place the roast on a rack in a broiler pan. Broil for 15 minutes.
4. Transfer the roast to a slow cooker.
5. Rinse the pinto beans, then drain them.
6. Add the beans to the slow cooker.
7. Stir in oregano, cumin, chili powder, green chiles, and enough water to cover.
8. Cook on low for 8-9 hours, stirring occasionally.
9. Add the chipotle peppers. Cook uncovered for an additional hour.
10. Skim off any fat and discard the bones.
11. Serve on corn chips with shredded cheese, chopped green onions, tomatoes, cucumbers, lettuce, avocado, salsa, and sour cream.
12. For leftovers, add a can of diced tomatoes or Rotel and serve over rice.
